sleep.description: Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much

score_1.label: Several days
indicators: a few nights of bad sleep
sleep a bit more than usual
waking up a couple times a week

score_2.label: More than half the days
indicators: almost always tired in the morning
sleeping problems most of the week

score_3.label: Nearly every day
indicators: lying awake every night for hours

probe_questions: How have your nights been going lately? Are you finding it easy to fall asleep?
Tell me about your sleep schedule recently — do you feel rested when you wake up?
Have you noticed any changes in how much or how well you sleep these days?

mood.description: Little interest or pleasure in doing things; feeling down, depressed, or hopeless

score_1.label: Several days
indicators: things feel a bit flat sometimes
some days don't feel like doing much

score_2.label: More than half the days
indicators: things that used to be fun aren't anymore

score_3.label: Nearly every day
indicators: stopped doing everything I used to love

probe_questions: What does a typical day look like for you lately? Are there things you're looking forward to?
Have you been able to enjoy your hobbies or things you normally like doing?
How would you describe your general mood over the past couple of weeks?

energy.description: Feeling tired or having little energy

score_1.label: Several days
indicators: a few days where I felt worn out
some days are harder than others

score_2.label: More than half the days
indicators: hard to get through the day
most tasks feel like a chore
frequently too tired to do things

score_3.label: Nearly every day
indicators: feel like a heavy weight all the time

probe_questions: How is your energy been lately? Do you find yourself getting through the day okay?
Have you been able to keep up with your usual activities — work, chores, things like that?
Do you ever feel so tired that even simple things feel like too much effort?

concentration.description: Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television

score_1.label: Several days
indicators: a few times had trouble focusing
occasionally lost my train of thought
not as sharp as usual some days

score_3.label: Nearly every day
indicators: failing at work because I can't focus

probe_questions: Have you been able to focus on things like work or reading lately?
Do you find your mind wandering a lot, or have you been more forgetful than usual?
How has your ability to concentrate on tasks been over the past couple of weeks?

score_1.label: Several days
indicators: a few days with poor appetite
skipped a meal here and there
eating a bit more for comfort sometimes

score_2.label: More than half the days
indicators: eating a lot more than usual most days
using food to cope with stress regularly
most days I don't feel like eating

probe_questions: How has your appetite been lately — are you eating roughly the same as usual?
Have you noticed any changes in how much you're eating, or whether you're enjoying food?
Do you ever find yourself skipping meals, or on the flip side, eating more than you normally would?
